title: Ubiquiti Wave Professional
description: The Ubiquiti Wave Professional is a 60 GHz outdoor unit designed for Point-to-Multipoint (PtMP) connections with Wave (PtP) technology. It is possible to connect a Wave AP. The device has 2 LAN ports with a speed of 2.5 Gbps and one SFP+ port with a speed of up to 10 Gbps In PtMP mode up to *8 km In PtP mode up to *15 km 60 Ghz SFP+ port Mods: PtMP,PtP Compatible with Wave AP Device PoE adapter 48V Power cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 60GHz [Mb/s] 5400 Security WPA2 AES Antenna gain [dBi] 46 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 100/1000/2500Mbps Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet Yes Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 26 Physical characteristics Designed for mast diameter [mm] 25 up to 76 Protection class IPX6 Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Weight [g] 2800 Width [mm] 424 Height [mm] 424 Depth [mm] 166
